GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [i_category@2 ASC, i_class@3 ASC, i_item_id@0 ASC, i_item_desc@1 ASC, revenueratio@6 ASC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[i_category@2 ASC, i_class@3 ASC, i_item_id@0 ASC, i_item_desc@1 ASC, revenueratio@6 ASC]
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[i_item_id@0 as i_item_id, i_item_desc@1 as i_item_desc, i_category@2 as i_category, i_class@3 as i_class, i_current_price@4 as i_current_price, sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)@5 as itemrevenue, CAST(sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)@5 AS Float64) * 100 / CAST(sum(sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)) PARTITION BY [item.i_class] ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING@6 AS Float64) as revenueratio]
      WindowAggExec: wdw=[sum(sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)) PARTITION BY [item.i_class] ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING: Ok(Field { name: "sum(sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)) PARTITION BY [item.i_class] ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING", data_type: Decimal128(27, 2), nullable: true, dict_id: 0, dict_is_ordered: false, metadata: {} }), frame: WindowFrame { units: Rows, start_bound: Preceding(UInt64(NULL)), end_bound: Following(UInt64(NULL)), is_causal: false }]
        GpuSortExec: expr=[i_class@3 ASC NULLS LAST]
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6242685
            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_class@3], 8), input_partitions=8
              GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_item_id, i_item_desc, i_category, i_class, i_current_price], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6242685
                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_id@0, i_item_desc@1, i_category@2, i_class@3, i_current_price@4], 8), input_partitions=8
                    GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_item_id, i_item_desc, i_category, i_class, i_current_price], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)]
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6242685
                        GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, ss_sold_date_sk@0)], projection=[2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6242685
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6242685
                                GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_date@1 >= 1999-02-22 AND d_date@1 <= 1999-03-24, projection=[0]
                                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=6242685
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6242685
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_sold_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                              GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_sold_date_sk@5 as ss_sold_date_sk, ss_ext_sales_price@6 as ss_ext_sales_price, i_item_id@0 as i_item_id, i_item_desc@1 as i_item_desc, i_current_price@2 as i_current_price, i_class@3 as i_class, i_category@4 as i_category]
                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6242685
                                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(i_item_sk@0, ss_item_sk@1)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8]
                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6242685
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=i_category@5 = Sports OR i_category@5 = Books OR i_category@5 = Home
                                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=6242685
                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6242685
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_item_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=6242685
--- memory ---
